description: A planner must coordinate satellite imagery (IMINT), signals intelligence (SIGINT), and a human intelligence (HUMINT) source to find a hidden weapons cache.

nodes.task_description: Use a HUMINT report to narrow down the search area to a specific village.

expected_outcome.value: Planner correctly uses the HUMINT to define the initial search box.

nodes.task_description: Task a SIGINT aircraft to fly over the village to detect any electronic emissions associated with security systems.

expected_outcome.value: Planner successfully tasks the SIGINT asset, which detects emissions from one specific compound.

nodes.task_description: Task an imaging satellite to take high-resolution pictures of the specific compound identified by SIGINT.

expected_outcome.value: Planner uses the SIGINT to focus the IMINT collection, leading to confirmation of the cache.
